tools.name: Currency State Diagnostic

questions.question: Is the source of FX rates used for transaction recording documented and consistently applied?
Is transaction currency recorded separately from settlement currency in your ERP?
Are settlement currency differences from transaction currency recognized and reconciled?
Does your organization have a documented account currency policy for each account class?
Is account currency reviewed before any G/L account is created or modified?
Are foreign currency account balances reviewed at period end against account currency policy?
Is foreign currency revaluation performed for all monetary items at period end?
Are revaluation results reconciled to ledger balances before close?
Are reporting currency translation rates applied consistently and documented?
Are currency translation adjustments correctly classified and disclosed?
Can consolidation currency adjustments be traced to source entity ledgers?
Can every material foreign currency balance be traced from source transaction to audit trail?

tools.disclaimer: The Currency State Diagnostic is a reference maturity framework for educational and self-assessment purposes. It does not provide accounting, audit, tax, legal, or ERP implementation advice. Consult qualified professionals for matters requiring professional judgment.

tools.name: Account Currency Control Checklist

items: Policy is aligned with functional currency determination
Account currency is set correctly for all G/L accounts
Foreign currency accounts are correctly identified
No account currency was set by default without review
Account currency changes require documented approval
Foreign currency balances are revalued at period end
Revaluation results are reconciled before close
Revaluation entries are documented in the audit trail
Account currency policy is available to auditors
Changes to account currency are logged and approved

tools.disclaimer: This checklist is a reference tool for educational and self-assessment purposes only. It does not constitute accounting, audit, tax, legal, or ERP implementation advice.
